card_description: Persus 9 Crew is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick proposes a "3-level" model of reality: (1) The Logos/Bible as a "punched tape" of ideas, (2) The World of Flesh/Nature, and (3) The Artificial/Technological World."
